name: e2e-until-pass-helper
description: Until-pass helper stops after the first passing check and skips later iterations.

work.task: Reply exactly UNTIL_PASS_WORK_TOKEN and do not inspect or modify files.

check.task: If the Current Work Attempt output preview includes UNTIL_PASS_WORK_TOKEN, reply exactly PASS E2E_UNTIL_PASS_OK. Otherwise reply exactly FAIL missing token. Do not inspect or modify files.
